message:
perf(http2): O(1) Huffman decode slow path via pre-built lookup index

Replace O(22*257) table scan in HPACK Huffman decoder slow path with
O(1) HashMap lookup per code length. Pre-built HUFFMAN_DECODE_INDEX
maps (code, code_bits) to symbol for codes 9-30 bits long.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
